title: Cross-Service Customer Escalation Triage with Budget Constraints (English)

agent_trace.summary: Successfully triaged 6 customer escalation emails with budget constraints. Matched each to CRM tier/revenue and helpdesk tickets. Processed: 2 high-ratio compensations saved as drafts (Huaxin 5.62%, Lianxiang 5.56%), 3 within-budget compensations approved (Mingda 2%, Botong 2.42%, Tianyu 1.67%), 1 anomaly flagged to legal (Hengda-churned, 11.11%).

actions: Read 7 inbox emails, identified 6 unique complaints
Queried CRM for 6 customers (CUS-001 to CUS-008, excluding CUS-006/007)
Retrieved 5 related helpdesk tickets (TK-1601 to TK-1605)
Saved 2 drafts for management approval: Huaxin Tech (5.62%), Lianxiang Innovation (5.56%)
Sent 3 approval notifications to Customer Service: Mingda Group (2%), Botong IT (2.42%), Tianyu Media (1.67%)
Sent 1 anomaly flag to Legal: Hengda Electronics (churned, 11.11% ratio)
updates.impact: Triage rules applied consistently. High-value compensation requests (>5% revenue) held for management approval. Budget-compliant requests (≤5%) processed immediately. Churned customer anomaly escalated to legal. All matched to existing helpdesk tickets.
